top_signals.title: Pimco Says Treasury Yields Driven by Fed Bets, Not AI, for Now
top_signals.summary: A boom in artificial intelligence-related borrowing may become a bigger influence on bond markets over time, but the idea that it’s behind a recent rise in long-dated Treasury yields appears overstated, according to Pacific Investment Management Co.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Bitcoin slides toward $70,000 as Strategy’s BTC sale, geopolitical risks weigh on crypto
top_signals.summary: Analysts said the size of Strategy's bitcoin sale was relatively trivial, but sent a bearish signal to the broader market.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Arm CEO Haas on Agentic AI and Taiwan's Ecosystem
top_signals.summary: Arm CEO Rene Haas explains how Taiwan's partner ecosystem is critical for AI development. He also discussed how the rapid rise of agentic AI will trigger immense growth in CPU demand. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Job Cuts or Job Change? AI Debate Heats Up
top_signals.summary:
A Mercer survey finds most Australian firms expect AI to cut up to 20% of jobs within two years, as worker confidence falls and fears rise. Speaking on Bloomberg: The Asia Trade, Mercer Workforce Solutions Leader Cynthia Cottrell breaks down the reality: rising restructuring, uneven AI adoption, and a workforce still playing catch-up.
What it means for jobs, graduates, and the future of work. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Anthropic offers EU access to Mythos
top_signals.summary: Bloc in talks to use American AI model in first expansion outside US and UK
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: BP’s head of gas and low carbon to leave group
top_signals.summary: William Lin’s departure after 30 years at energy company follows sacking of chair last week
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Nine injured and 47,000 without power as Tropical Storm Jangmi threatens Kyushu
top_signals.summary: The Meteorological Agency has warned of violent winds, high waves, storm surges, landslides, flooding and overflowing rivers in affected areas.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Bitmine buys $52M ETH as Tom Lee says price not yet showing Ethereum’s strength
top_signals.summary: Bitmine is aiming to hold 5% of the total circulating supply of 120.6 million Ether tokens and is about 90% of the way to its target after its latest purchase.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Strategy’s Bitcoin sale causes clash for $80M in Polymarket bets
top_signals.summary: A clash has erupted among Polymarket users over the timing and disclosure of a recent Bitcoin sale by Strategy, with more than $80 million traded on the disputed outcome.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: If performance matters more than privilege then prove it
top_signals.summary: New research shows investors still perceive privately educated CEOs as a “safer bet” despite no evidence of stronger performance outcomes, says Vincent Keaveny Last week at the House of Lords, senior leaders from across financial services gathered to launch Progress Together’s new campaign: Making the Invisible Visible. The campaign focuses on a challenge British business [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Wayve: London robotaxis will make passengers forget there’s no driver
top_signals.summary: Wayve believes Londoners will stop noticing they are sitting in driverless cars within minutes of using them, as the British AI startup prepares to launch autonomous vehicles on Uber’s network in the capital. Katie Fisher, Wayve’s vice president of commercial and operations, said the company expected passengers to move quickly from novelty to habit once [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Japan helps restore flood-damaged court papers in Sri Lanka
top_signals.summary: More than 170,000 documents at a court in the city of Kandy were soaked in floodwater when the island was affected by Cyclone Ditwah last November.
